title: Let's Go Gambling!
description: Vegas-style casino feel with Poker, Blackjack, Roulette, Craps, Baccarat, and Video Poker.
body:
![Let's Go Gambling!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f87d8d0532afbacb88f09b4edc1c4af33c9d649c.png)

# Let's Go Gambling!
## Adds a fully-featured Vegas-style feel to Minecraft. Poker room with custom villager generates naturally in the world and contain six playable games:

(Very WIP)

## Games:
<details>
<summary>- Texas Hold'em Poker — up to 6 players, full betting rounds</summary>
  
![Texas Hold'em](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13cedbb1b2c93a4566a6ea77462e527ae9dd4eb3.png)

</details>




<details>
<summary>- Blackjack — split, double, insurance</summary>

![Blackjack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80eefcacc5ada3dab0716dc0e452751470bbc861.png)

</details>




<details>
<summary>- Roulette — full European layout with dozens, outside bets, and a spinning wheel animation</summary>

  ![Roulette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6683a2e56983ee5e3f709fd1e49c9e54a7c16771.png)

</details>



  
<details>
<summary>- Craps (Heavy WIP) — complete craps layout with pass/don't-pass, come, field, and hard-way bets</summary>

![Craps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb3b224a316b8968d90d2e6d23d00ec76db210fb.png)

</details>




  
<details>
<summary>- Baccarat — classic player vs banker</summary>

![Baccarat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e586e9b6e52b007f7375889f9690f789af22587.png)

</details>




<details>
<summary>- Video Poker — Jacks or Better</summary>

![Video Poker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce5d541b5d5bccb3854656941b60db12a8c407f5.png)

</details>


Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) 0.15.11+
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 0.100.8+1.21

How to play
Find or locate a Casino structure in the world, exchange resources for chips at the chip exchange block, then right-click any game table to start playing.

Config
Features a config file for easy editing of the Chip Exchange table. Works with modded blocks!
